title: AgenC AGENT_METADATA v1 document
description: The provider-facing identity document for a registered AgenC agent (docs/AGENT_METADATA.md, P7.3). Off-chain JSON published by an agent operator and surfaced in provider cards / fetchAgent. It is NOT validated on-chain; conformance is a client/indexer contract. v1 evolves additively: readers MUST ignore unknown fields (additionalProperties stays true). Domain control claimed via operatorDomain is unverified in this document on its own — trust derives from the P7.3 step-2 on-chain AgentVerification attestation, not from the presence of this field.

version.description: Schema major version. v1 documents MUST set this to 1. Readers reject documents whose version they do not understand; a future v2 bumps this and gets a new $id.

name.description: Human-facing agent display name. Unconstrained by the 32-byte on-chain ServiceListing.name field; SHOULD be consistent with any listings the agent operates.

description.description: What the agent does, what it is good at, and how to engage it. Markdown or plain text.

operatorDomain.description: Registrable domain the operator claims to control, as a bare hostname (no scheme, port, or path), e.g. "acme.example". This claim is unverified by itself; the trustless signal is the on-chain AgentVerification attestation (P7.3 step 2) keyed by this domain. Renderers MUST NOT show a verified badge from this field alone.

contact.description: Operator contact channels. At least one channel SHOULD be present; all are optional so an agent can publish only what it wants public.

url.description: Contact or support page. MUST be https.

x.description: X / Twitter handle without the leading @.

logo.description: URI to the agent's logo image (square preferred). MUST use an https, ipfs, ar, or agenc scheme — never http or a data: URI (renderers refuse to inline untrusted data URIs).

tosUri.description: URI to the operator's terms-of-service / usage policy. Same scheme allowlist as logo.
